name: 未婚夫背叛（渣男與白蓮花聯手）
name_en: Fiancé Betrayal (Scumbag and White Lotus Alliance)
description: 五年未婚夫與養妹暗中在一起，利用母親的病作為要挾手段控制女主。衝突核心是信任的徹底崩塌和被雙重背叛的痛感。

examples.drama_title: 👑Abandoned by Family, She is Reborn as the Wife of a Billionaire, and They Beg for Her Forgiveness!
examples.excerpt: Don't you get to be the perfect house husband for Mave. Don't think I don't know this. You and Mave have been together for ages. Get lost.
examples.context: 五年未婚夫與養妹暗中在一起，利用母親的病作為要挾手段控制女主。衝突核心是信任的徹底崩塌和被雙重背叛的痛感。
